items.title: Sauce Gardner: I’m Colts’ first-round pick (next year, too)
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Sauce Gardner isn’t buying into the notion that the Indianapolis Colts don’t have a pick in the first round of Thursday night’s NFL Draft. “I’m the first-round pick,’’ he said this week with a smile.
